symbols.description: Large black character resembling the Chinese oracle/bronze script form of 天 (tiān, 'heaven') or 大 (dà, 'great'), composed of a horizontal top bar, a vertical central stem, and two outward-curving lower strokes meeting a central point
symbols.position: centered at the bottom of the page
symbols.size_estimate: very large (dominant element of the page)

uncertain_or_unreadable: The two text blocks consist of glyphs from a script I cannot identify (possibly a constructed/decorative script, Tengwar-like runes, or an invented runic system). I cannot read or transliterate their content.
The repeating symbol 'Λ' (lambda-like) and numerical-looking glyphs (1, 4, 8, 9) within the text blocks are unclear whether they represent digits or stylistic characters.
Whether the bottom large glyph is exactly 天 (tian/heaven) or 大 (da/great) in oracle script is uncertain, but its form most closely matches tian.
